title: ageratinastrum polyphyllum var. polyphyllum
intro: Ageratinastrum polyphyllum var. polyphyllum, also known as the 'Many-Flowered Ageratinastrum', is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to South Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ageratinastrum polyphyllum var. polyphyllum include the relief of digestive issues, the treatment of respiratory problems, and the management of fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
